$comment: Per-step context cost estimates (main-context tokens). Subagent-dispatched steps split cost into 'main' (dispatch + return-summary that stays in the parent session) and 'subagent' (consumed in the child task, does NOT count against main). Adjust as we learn from real runs.

thresholds.$comment: Below green_max_pct = safe. Between green and yellow = recommend /save-session at next HITL gate. Above red_min_pct = block subagent dispatch until /save-session.

curriculum_ingest.notes: Pure Python script run via Bash; agent only reads summary.

topic_corpus_build.notes: Subagent reads sequence.md + prior corpora + external resources, generates 11-section markdown. Main session sees only the summary + section IDs.

corpus_critic.notes: Reads corpus + sequence.md + topic.resources.json, emits structured critic report.

topic_corpus_review.notes: Section-by-section HITL via AskUserQuestion. Main context burns proportional to number of sections needing revision.

generate_reading.notes: Reading subagent writes 10–30 min reading grounded in corpus + resources. Main sees only headline + file path.

quiz_critic.notes: Runs positional + length bias checks; defensively reshuffles correct-answer positions.

generate_diagram.notes: Via Excalidraw MCP — creates view + checkpoint; PNG export is part of MCP response.

module_drift_critic.notes: Parallel pass across all topics in the just-completed module. Returns a compact diff/summary.

course_drift_critic.notes: Runs across all modules in a course (potentially spanning multiple weeks). Checks weekly time-budget compliance (90 min target per week) plus cross-module terminology consistency.

recommendations_at_gate.$comment: When the user hits a HITL gate, the context-budget-advisor picks a recommendation based on (current_pct + projected_next_step.main / context_window_total_tokens * 100).

in_yellow.message: Approaching 40%. /save-session here would let you resume cleanly in a new session if needed.

above_red.message: Past 60%. /save-session now — next subagent dispatch could push us past where the main session can recover.
